sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Proclus</hi> Philosophus [Procl.] <date TEIform="date">v A.D.</date> ad Hes.<title_ TEIform="title">Op.</title_> = ad Hesiodi <title_ TEIform="title">Opera et Dies,</title_> ed. T. Gaisford, <title_ TEIform="title">Poetae Graeci Minores,</title_> vol. iii, p. 9. <title_ TEIform="title">Chr. = Chrestomathia,</title_> ed. T. W. Allen, <title_ TEIform="title">Homeri Opera</title_> v, Oxford (OCT), p. 99. <title_ TEIform="title">H. = Hymni,</title_> ed. E. Abel (post Orphica, p. 276). <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp. = Hypotyposis astronomicarum positionum,</title_> ed. C. Manitius, Leipzig (T.) 1909. <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc. = in Platonis Alcibiadem,</title_> ed. F. Creuzer, Frankfurt 1820. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra. = in Platonis Cratylum commentaria,</title_> ed. G. Pasquali, Leipzig (T.) 1908. <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc. = in primum Euclidis librum commentarius,</title_> ed. G. Fried- lein, Leipzig (T.) 1873. <title_ TEIform="title">in Prm. = in Platonis Parmenidem commentarii,</title_> ed. G. Stallbaum, Leipzig 1840. <title_ TEIform="title">in R. = in Platonis Rempublicam commentarii,</title_> ed. W. Kroll, 2 vols., Leipzig (T.) 1899, 1901. <title_ TEIform="title">in Ti. = in Platonis Timaeum commentarii,</title_> ed. E. Diehl, 3 vols., Leipzig (T.) 1903, 1904, 1906. <title_ TEIform="title">Inst = Institutio Theologica,</title_> ed. F. Dübner, in F. Creuzer & G. Moser, <title_ TEIform="title">Plotinus,</title_> pp. li-cxvii, Paris (D.) 1855. <title_ TEIform="title">Inst.Phys. = Institutio Physica,</title_> ed. A. Ritzenfeld, Leipzig (T.) 1912. <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol. = Paraphrasis Ptolemaei Tetrabiblou,</title_> ed. L. Allatius, Basel 1554 (cited by page). <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τῆς κατὰ Ιιλάτωνα θεολογίας,</foreign> ed. Aem. Portus, Hamburg 1618.</item>
